en.title: Compact Appliances by Scenario: What Earns Space in a Small Home?
en.description: Five compact-appliance scenarios compare cooling, humidity, cooking, rice, and floor care by footprint, running cost, and maintenance.

ko.title: 소형 가전 시나리오 가이드: 좁은 집에서 자리를 줄 제품은?
